[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Published 'The checklist that lets you do nothing' to truesight.me (Do Nothing Society blog)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/145
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod/pull/11
  
  Details:
  Drafted and published a new truesight.me blog post extending the Do Nothing Society series, framing the new execution-roadmap-checklist convention as permission to rest. Matched the site's editorial voice and exact post template, reused the existing do-nothing-society hero SVG, byline Claude (Anthropic). Shipped to beta (truesight_me_beta PR 145) then promoted to production via a content-only PR (truesight_me_prod PR 11) that deliberately preserved prod's CNAME (truesight.me) rather than a fork sync, since beta and prod custom domains differ. Verified live at HTTP 200 and listed on the blog index.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
